74881.subject:
This Week's Headlines: OpenAI's Filing. Cursor's Sale. Kalshi's
 Revenue.
74881.body:
Pre-IPO Briefing

StartEngine Private (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/MX3KT-mkkr1N7pRCyxMfbcvW7MhRLh5Qzb9vN28qGwj3lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3pYVR3fZf2W5Vg3W8WFYgD7NJyCWW1yy1n11Y3L65V_wdQq3CdMrzW6zm52W19M00YVsxqhX81GPdxW2gFzhj6zGMhPW8h1J198Qx5BcW3KYJ3Q6RtF1QW4xqzK33lqzzNW6d3bVy5MdtdNV_js7641S7T7W7Tf-DW4cj2JhW7Rd5xN1SyQbHW96x6Zp4YXbcGW3wgQTn38KjptW4jmTbK5ycnn4W4fRQ8r3ZRf7tW3xxNRx5fCbF6W4bxKGR5HYKHGW7RdQTs7zy193W4Whg6B7Gm6mkf7Z3c7F04 )

private-header-Jun-19-2026-06-21-02-5340-PM (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/MX3KT-mkkr1N7pRCyxMfbcvW7MhRLh5Qzb9vN28qGwj3lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3pYVR3fZf2W5Vg3W8WFYgD7NJyCWW1yy1n11Y3L65V_wdQq3CdMrzW6zm52W19M00YVsxqhX81GPdxW2gFzhj6zGMhPW8h1J198Qx5BcW3KYJ3Q6RtF1QW4xqzK33lqzzNW6d3bVy5MdtdNV_js7641S7T7W7Tf-DW4cj2JhW7Rd5xN1SyQbHW96x6Zp4YXbcGW3wgQTn38KjptW4jmTbK5ycnn4W4fRQ8r3ZRf7tW3xxNRx5fCbF6W4bxKGR5HYKHGW7RdQTs7zy193W4Whg6B7Gm6mkf7Z3c7F04 )

Hi Oleg,

There’s a lot to cover with our latest Pre-IPO Briefing, so let’s get right to it:

- Anysphere, the company behind AI coding platform Cursor, is being acquired by Spacex for $60B worth of stock. The announcement came just days after SpaceX’s record IPO.¹
- Databricks is reportedly seeking an estimated $175B valuation for its next round. The company last raised a Series L in December 2025 with an estimated$134B valuation.²
- Kalshi is generating more than $2B in ARR according to The Information, up 3x since November. Kalshi’s growth has prompted informal IPO talks with investment banks.³
- OpenAI confidentially filed for an IPO with the SEC, setting the stage for what CNBC says could be “one of the largest public markets debuts in history.”⁴
- Perplexity announced that it plans to go public in 2028, regardless of how the market receives the potential listings of Anthropic and OpenAI.⁵
- Tenstorrent is reportedly in talks to be acquired by Qualcomm. The deal could be worth as much as $10B, which would be a “significant premium to Tenstorrent’s last valuation.”⁶

There’s no guarantee that Kalshi, OpenAI, or Perplexity will go public, or that Tenstorrent will be acquired. Regulation of prediction markets is a hotly contested political and legal issue. Kalshi has been the subject of state and federal scrutiny, and future legal or regulatory developments could impact its operations.

These reports don’t imply specific results for investors with exposure to these companies via StartEngine. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Additionally, there's no guarantee that revenue, funding, or valuation will continue to grow for these companies, or that they’ll be profitable.

All of this news tells a familiar story: some of today’s most closely watched companies are reaching massive scale while still private.

StartEngine (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/MX3KT-mkkr1N7pRCyxMfbcvW7MhRLh5Qzb9vN28qGwj3lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3pYVR3fZf2W5Vg3W8WFYgD7NJyCWW1yy1n11Y3L65V_wdQq3CdMrzW6zm52W19M00YVsxqhX81GPdxW2

74880.subject: Weekly Recap: US Perps Go Onshore, CME Sues to Stop Them
74880.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

US perpetuals went onshore this week. **Kraken** and **Coinbase** lit up CFTC-regulated perp futures on Monday — and by Friday **CME** was suing the CFTC to stop the rollout from spreading.

Alongside it: **AWS** wired **Coinbase**'s x402 protocol into CloudFront for AI-agent payments, and the US government's shutdown of Anthropic's Fable model gave crypto-AI its cleanest case for a decentralized stack.

Enjoy!

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/dde107bb-9538-450e-ab61-e3667aee2c18/image.png)
Caption: 

Nexo is a digital wealth platform offering crypto yield up to 15% and crypto-backed credit lines from 1.9%. **[Join and get 30-day access to exclusive rates](https://nexo.com/defiant2)**. Terms apply.

———————————————————————————

———————————————————————————

##### WATCH

## NEAR's AI Vindication

Youtube: 🟢 LIVE - NEAR's AI Vindication (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rI0vidTFJBM)

If centralized AI just gave crypto its case, NEAR is the chain that's been building for it. **Camila Russo** sits down with **Illia Polosukhin**, NEAR co-founder and one of the co-authors of the original "Attention Is All You Need" paper that started the modern AI era — on the day Anthropic's Fable model was shut down by the US government and the crypto-AI thesis NEAR has spent years building got its sharpest validation yet.

———————————————————————————

# Top Stories This Week

## Kraken and Coinbase Bring Perps Onshore as US Derivatives Markets Shift

**Kraken** and **Coinbase** launched [CFTC-regulated perpetual futures](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/kraken-coinbase-perps-onshore-us-derivatives-launch) on Monday, ending years of offshore-only access for US traders. By Friday, [CME Group sued the CFTC](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/cme-group-sue-cftc-perpetual-futures-approval-dodd-frank-swaps-definition) to halt the approval, arguing perps fit the Dodd-Frank definition of a swap and should clear through swap infrastructure. Kalshi and [eleven other venues](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/kalshi-eyes-broader-asset-classes-perpetual-futures-55b-crypto-launc) already filed under the same path.

## Fable's Shutdown Hands Crypto Its Case for Decentralized AI

**Anthropic**'s [Fable model was shut down by the US government](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/fable-s-shutdown-hands-crypto-its-case-for-decentralized-ai) Thursday — a regulator action that severed customer access overnight. NEAR, Bittensor, Render, and Akash rallied on the news. The cohort had been building infrastructure for the case that frontier-AI customers face a structural single point of failure; Fable is the cleanest reference event for that thesis since the cohort formed.

## AWS Plugs Coinbase's x402 Into CloudFront for AI-Agent Payments

**Amazon Web Services** [integrated Coinbase's x402 payment protocol i

>>> Dobry ,
>>>
>>> Chcel by som sa spytat ci mate este volny termin na 26.07.2026, a ked
>>> Ano, ta potom mohli by sme zajtra stretnut?
>>>
>>> вт, 19 трав. 2026 р. о 12:09 Posh Posh Weddings <info@poshposh.sk> пише:
>>>
>>>> Zdravíme nevestu💍🤍,
>>>>
>>>> Ďakujeme veľmi pekne za vašu správu.. Termín svadby máme ešte voľný a
>>>> veľmi radi budeme súčasťou vašej svadby.🤍
>>>>
>>>> Spravidla sa s klientami stretávame osobne v showroome v Rozhanovciach
>>>> (kúsok od Košíc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladať svadobnú výzdobu a na základe
>>>> toho vytvoriť cenovú ponuku na mieru pre vás ak by ste mali záujem prosím
>>>> navrhnite deň a čas kedy by vám to najviac vyhovovalo aby sa časovo radi
>>>> prispôsobíme vášmu času. Poprípade, ak sme mimo Košíc či Prešova, radi si s
>>>> Vami dohodneme videohovor. Prosím navrhnite deň a čas, ktorý by Vám
>>>> vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných hodinách. 🙂
>>>> Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme stretnutia sa
>>>> radi prispôsobíme Vám, čo je pre Vás praktickejšie ☺️
>>>>
>>>> Budeme sa tešiť na prípadnú spoluprácu s Vami.
>>>>
>>>> S pozdravom
>>>>
>>>> Lenka Gattiker,
>>>> Vaša osobná posh asistentka
>>>>
